options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_maps_unlocked
options.description: Number of maps to start unlocked, the rest will require AP items to access

options.name: round_location_max
options.description: Maximum of rounds per map to be included as an AP location / check.

options.name: round_location_freq
options.description:
Frequency of rounds to award an AP location / check for.
e.g. Setting this to 3 and Max Round Location to 15 means you'll get a check on rounds 3, 6, 9, 12 and 15

options.name: kill_checks_enabled
options.description: Add kill counts per map as checks

options.name: headshot_checks_enabled
options.description: Add headshot counts per map as checks

options.name: start_quick_revive
options.description: Start with Quick Revive on all maps.

options.name: randomized_shield_parts
options.description: Shuffles your shield parts into the item pool

options.name: map_specific_machines
options.description: Enables map specific perk machine items

options.name: easter_egg_checks_enabled
options.description: Include Easter Egg steps as AP locations / checks when Easter Egg Hunt is not the goal condition

options.name: music_ee_enabled
options.description: Include music easter eggs as AP locations / checks

options.name: mystery_box_special_items
options.description: Shuffles special Mystery Box item unlocks (Wonder weapons, special equipment, specialist weapons) into the item pool

options.name: mystery_box_regular_items
options.description: Shuffles regular Mystery Box item unlocks into the item pool

options.name: mystery_box_expanded
options.description: Shuffles most non-Mystery Box weapons into the Mystery Box as well

options.name: super_ee_reward
options.description: Enables the Super EE reward (Starting RK5)

options.name: starting_weapons_1
options.description: Number of strength 1 weapons to start with on each map (wallbuys + box)

options.name: starting_weapons_2
options.description: Number of strength 2 weapons to start with on each map (wallbuys + box)

options.name: starting_weapons_3
options.description: Number of strength 3 weapons to start with on each map (wallbuys + box)

options.name: starting_weapons_4
options.description: Number of strength 4 weapons to start with on each map (wallbuys + box)

options.name: starting_weapons_5
options.display_name: Starting Weapon Unlocks - Wonder Weapons / Special Equipment
options.description: Number of strength 5 weapons to start with on each map (wallbuys + box)

options.name: attachments_randomized
options.description: Whether to randomize attachments per weapon per seed

options.name: attachments_sight_weight
options.description: Probability of a large sight (Recon, Infra-Red etc) being chosen instead of a small sight (Iron sights, reflex etc)

options.name: camo_mixed
options.display_name: Camo - Base Weapon Can Have Upgraded Camo

options.name: camo_pap_mixed
options.display_name: Camo - Upgraded Weapon Can Have Base Camo

options.name: camo_joined
options.display_name: Camo - Base Weapon will match Upgraded Weapon

options.name: reticle_joined
options.display_name: Scope Reticle - Base Weapon will match Upgraded Weapon

options.name: goal_condition
options.description:
Condition to finish the see.
Easter Egg Hunt: Complete the Main Easter Egg on enabled maps
Weapon Quest: Complete all weapon quests on enabled maps
Victory Round: Reach a selected round on enabled maps

options.name: goal_round
options.description: Round to award Goal Round to award victory on when running the Victory Round goal condition

options.name: goal_round_count
options.display_name: Goal Round - Number of maps to goal
options.description: Number of maps to meet the goal round to satisfy the win condition. This will not exceed the number of selected maps.

options.name: goal_ee_count
options.description: Number of Main Easter Eggs needed to complete the seed when running Easter Egg Hunt. This will not exceed the number of selected maps

options.name: goal_ee_random
options.display_name: Easter Egg Hunt - Specific Required Maps
options.description: Randomize which Easter Eggs are required. If disabled, you may complete any number of enabled maps to meet your Easter Egg Goal Count

options.name: perk_limit_default_modifier
options.description: Modifier for initial perk limit, e.g If a map has a perk limit of 4, then -1 modifier will make it 3

options.name: progressive_perk_limit_increase
options.description: How many increases to the perk limit to add to the item pool

options.name: progressive_starting_points
options.description: How many extra starting points to add into the pool. This will be rounded to 500

options.name: map_shadows_enabled
options.description: Enables Map: "Shadows of Evil"

options.name: map_the_giant_enabled
options.description: Enables Map: "The Giant".

options.name: map_zetsubou_enabled
options.description: Enables Map: "Zetsubou No Shima".

options.name: map_castle_enabled
options.description: Enables Map: "Castle".

options.name: map_gorod_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Gorod Krovi"

options.name: map_revelations_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Revelations"

options.name: map_kino_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Kino der Toten"

options.name: map_moon_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Moon"

options.name: map_origins_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Origins"

options.name: start_map_hints
options.description: Start hints the maps you have in the pool.

options.name: randomized_gorod_dragonride_parts
options.description: Shuffles the parts to unlock the pack-a-punch into the item pool

options.name: castle_bow_count
options.display_name: (Der Eisendrache) Number of Elemental Bow Quests with Checks
options.description: Number of random Elemental Bow quests to include in checks or Weapon Quest goal conditions

options.name: castle_bow_storm
options.description: Allow the Storm bow to be one of your random Elemental Bow quest checks

options.name: castle_bow_wolf
options.description: Allow the Wolf bow to be one of your random Elemental Bow quest checks

options.name: castle_bow_fire
options.description: Allow the Fire bow to be one of your random Elemental Bow quest checks

options.name: castle_bow_void
options.description: Allow the Void bow to be one of your random Elemental Bow quest checks

options.name: revelations_mask_count
options.description: Number of random Revelations Mask quests to include in checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_dire_wolf
options.description: Enable Dire Wolf mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_siegfried
options.description: Enable Helmet of Siegfried mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_king
options.description: Enable Helmet of the King mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_fury
options.description: Enable Fury's Head mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_margwa
options.description: Enable Margwa's mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_keeper_skull
options.description: Enable Keeper Skull mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: revelations_mask_enabled_apothicon
options.description: Enable Apothicon God Mask check for Revelations Mask checks

options.name: origins_staff_upgrade_checks
options.description: Enables Staff Upgrade checks when using Goal Round victory condition

options.name: map_workshop_wanted_enabled
options.description: Enabled Map: "Wanted"

options.name: shop_perk_tokens
options.description: One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to get any perk including those not unlocked yet

options.name: shop_mega_gums
options.description: One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to get a random mega gobblegum

options.name: shop_rare_gums
options.description: One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to get a random rare mega gobblegum

options.name: shop_legendary_gums
options.description: One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to get a random legandary mega gobblegum

options.name: shop_starting_checkpoint_tokens
options.description: Added to starting inventory. One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to immediately make a checkpoint.

options.name: shop_additional_checkpoint_tokens
options.description: Shuffled into the item pool. One time use per map (unless save data is cleared), these can be spent to immediately make a checkpoint.

options.name: difficulty_rng_moon_digger
options.description: Make sure the Tunnel 6 digger turns up by roughly round 16 if it hasn't happened earlier

options.name: difficulty_rng_moon_box
options.description: Add Revelations style Mystery Box weighting to Wave Gun, Gersh Devices and QEDs on Moon

options.name: difficulty_gorod_egg_cooldown
options.description: Instantly cool down the egg instead of waiting 2 rounds to retrieve it each time

options.name: difficulty_gorod_dragon_wings
options.description: Start the game with the Dragon Wings unlocked in the Department Store

options.name: difficulty_ee_checkpoints
options.description: Number of checkpoints along the easter egg quest, for completing various steps.

options.name: difficulty_round_checkpoints
options.description: Makes a checkpoint every X round, if above 0

options.name: deathlink_enabled
options.description: Deathlink Enabled. This can be disabled during the AP, but not during it.

options.name: deathlink_send_mode
options.description: Action which will send a deathlink

options.name: deathlink_recv_mode
options.description: Consequence of being sent a deathlink

options.name: gift_weight
options.description: Weighting of gifts to replace filler with

options.name: trap_weight
options.description: Weighting of traps to replace filler with

options.name: special_rounds_enabled
options.description: Enables Special Rounds (Dogs, Monkeys, ect.).

options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
